normalization: Removed markdown fencing and post-JSON commentary while preserving opened files, emitted fields, decisions, and evidence claims.
answer: task_shape=architecture-design plus irreversible data-boundary decision; executor=subagent; target_surface=no selected surface, with one registry O candidate and one certified ample T1 candidate; effect_floor=O solely because architecture judgment and irreversible error cost are high; qualification=the O candidate is ineligible because candidate is not certified and role/admission are unknown, while T1 is below floor; ranked_fallback contains the rejected O candidate as a rejected chain entry and does not dispatch it; runtime_handle=none; endpoint_verdict=hold until exact O qualification or user/replan evidence exists, with dispatch_now=false.
